ddls:
CREATE TABLE "award_recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award recipient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the award recipient */,
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the affiliation of the award recipient */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the discipline of the award recipient */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "medal_of_technology_recipient" INTEGER /* Whether the recipient received the Medal of Technology */,
  "nobel_prize_year" INTEGER /* Year the Nobel Prize was received (if applicable) */,
  "deceased" INTEGER /* Whether the recipient is deceased */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the recipient */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death of the recipient (if applicable) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the recipient */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the recipient */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the recipient */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to a profile image of the recipient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_recipients_affiliation_id FOREIGN KEY ("affiliation_id") REFERENCES affiliations ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_recipients_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation */,
  "affiliation_name" TEXT /* Name of the affiliation */,
  "affiliation_type" TEXT /* Type of affiliation (e.g., university, research institution) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the affiliation */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the affiliation was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the affiliation */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the affiliation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplines" (
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discipline */,
  "discipline_name" TEXT /* Name of the discipline */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the discipline */,
  "related_fields" TEXT /* Related fields or sub-disciplines */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., Nobel Prize, Medal of Technology) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the award */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_recipient_awards" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award recipient */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "award_citation" TEXT /* Citation or reason for the award */,
  "award_ceremony_location" TEXT /* Location where the award ceremony took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id", "award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nobel_prizes" (
  "nobel_prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Nobel Prize */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award recipient */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the Nobel Prize was awarded */,
  "nobel_prize_category" TEXT /* Category of the Nobel Prize (e.g., Physiology or Medicine) */,
  "prize_share" TEXT /* Share of the prize (e.g., 1/2, 1/3) */,
  "prize_citation" TEXT /* Citation or reason for the Nobel Prize */,
  "prize_ceremony_location" TEXT /* Location where the Nobel Prize ceremony took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nobel_prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nobel_prizes_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES award_recipients ("recipient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medal_of_technology_recipients" (
  "medal_of_technology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Medal of Technology recipient */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award recipient */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the Medal of Technology was awarded */,
  "medal_citation" TEXT /* Citation or reason for the Medal of Technology */,
  "medal_ceremony_location" TEXT /* Location where the Medal of Technology ceremony took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medal_of_technology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medal_of_technology_recipients_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES award_recipients ("recipient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award recipient being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES award_recipients ("recipient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_recipient_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award recipient */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of the publication */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., journal article, book) */,
  "publication_url" TEXT /* URL to the publication */,
  "co_authors" TEXT /* List of co-authors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_recipient_publications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES award_recipients ("recipient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_recipient_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award recipient */,
  "contribution_description" TEXT /* Description of the contribution */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the contribution */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the contribution (e.g., significant, moderate) */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Funding sources for the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_recipient_contributions_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES award_recipients ("recipient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_recipient_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "recipient_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first award recipient */,
  "recipient_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second award recipient */,
  "collaboration_description" TEXT /* Description of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date of the collaboration */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project or research collaboration */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project or research collaboration */,
  "project_funding" TEXT /* Funding sources for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_recipient_collaborations_recipient_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id2") REFERENCES award_recipients ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_recipient_collaborations_recipient_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id1") REFERENCES award_recipients ("recipient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_recipient_award_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award recipient */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., recipient, co-recipient) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_recipient_award_relationships_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES award_recipients ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_recipient_award_relationships_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_recipient_nobel_prize_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award recipient */,
  "nobel_prize_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Nobel Prize */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., recipient, co-recipient) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_recipient_nobel_prize_relationships_nobel_prize_id FOREIGN KEY ("nobel_prize_id") REFERENCES nobel_prizes ("nobel_prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_recipient_nobel_prize_relationships_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES award_recipients ("recipient_id")
)
